hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *"packages/ui"* ]]; then cd /Users/jessicacheng/thoughtful/gridland && bun run --cwd packages/ui test --bail 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|PASS|snapshot|✓|✗|error)' | head -20; fi
hooks.description: Snapshot regression check — fails if any UI snapshot changed unexpectedly

hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *"packages/ui"* || "$file" == *"packages/utils"* || "$file" == *"packages/core"* ]]; then cd /Users/jessicacheng/thoughtful/gridland && packages/ui/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -30; fi
hooks.description: TypeScript check on UI package changes
